The '''Tetan space yacht''' was a class of [[Transport/Legends|transports]] used by [[Tetan/Legends|Tetan]] royalty circa [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]]. The ''[[Krath Enchanter]]'' belonged to this class.

==Appearances==
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 1]]
*[[Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising 2|''Tales of the Jedi – The Freedon Nadd Uprising'' 2]] {{1stID|Tetan space yacht}}
